klaus.name: Dr. Klaus Weber
klaus.notes: Bevorzugt schriftliche Updates vor Meetings. Gründlich und zahlenorientiert.

q2.title: Q2 Finanzplanungsgespräch
q2.agenda: Budget-Review Q1, Planung Q2-Q3, FTE-Anfragen der Fachabteilungen
q2.summary: Budget für Q2 genehmigt. Erhöhung der FTE-Quote für Q3 beschlossen. Klaus erstellt Detailplan bis Ende Mai.

bericht.title: Quartalsbericht Q2 fertigstellen
bericht.notes: Alle Kostenstellen konsolidieren. Abweichungsanalyse einfügen. Präsentation für den Vorstand vorbereiten.

budget.title: Budgeterhöhung Q3 genehmigen
budget.rationale: Wachstumsziele erfordern 3 zusätzliche FTE in Q3. CFO hat Kostenvorteil gegenüber externen Beratern bestätigt.
budget.outcome: Budget für 3 neue Stellen in Q3 freigegeben. Klaus koordiniert den Einstellungsprozess.

recruiting.title: Neue Recruiting-Plattform einführen
recruiting.rationale: Aktuelle Plattform verursacht hohe manuelle Aufwände. 3 Angebote werden derzeit evaluiert.

umsatz.title: Umsatz um 20 % steigern bis Ende 2026
umsatz.description: Kombination aus Neukundengewinnung, Upselling bei Bestandskunden und Ausbau des DACH-Markts.

fuhrung.title: Führungsteam erweitern
fuhrung.description: Zwei neue Senior-Führungspositionen besetzen: Head of Product und Head of Engineering.

memory.value: Deutsch bevorzugt für alle internen Kommunikationen.

michael.name: Michael Chang
michael.notes: Prefers concise exec summaries. Responds quickly via email. Key decision-maker for Series B.

emma.name: Emma Wilson
emma.notes: Highly responsive. Specialises in startup IP and SaaS agreements.

seriesB.title: Series B Prep Call
seriesB.agenda: Valuation discussion, timeline for close, open diligence items, lead investor commitments
seriesB.summary: Michael confirmed $30M cap at agreed valuation. Full due diligence package requested by end of April. Term sheet targeted for mid-May.

legalReview.title: Legal Review: Terms of Service Update
legalReview.agenda: Review ToS v2 draft, data processing clauses, liability caps, user data provisions

deck.title: Prepare Series B investor deck
deck.notes: Incorporate updated ARR figures, unit economics, and 18-month runway projection. Include team slide.

tos.title: Review and approve updated Terms of Service
tos.notes: Focus on data retention clauses and liability caps. Ensure GDPR and CCPA alignment.

seriesB.title: Proceed with Series B at $30M valuation
seriesB.rationale: Lead investor confirmed commitment. Valuation reflects 4x ARR multiple, in line with market comps.
seriesB.outcome: Series B term sheet targeting Q2 close. Michael Chang leading the round with two additional co-investors.

counsel.title: Retain external IP legal counsel
counsel.rationale: Growing IP portfolio and pending patent applications require specialized expertise beyond in-house scope.
counsel.outcome: Engaged Wilson & Partners for IP matters. Scope agreed for 12-month retainer.

closeSeriesB.title: Close Series B funding round
closeSeriesB.description: Raise $30M Series B to fund 18 months of runway, enterprise sales, and key hires.

v2.title: Launch product v2.0
v2.description: Ship v2.0 with new AI features, enterprise SSO, and redesigned onboarding flow.

memory.value: Pre-Series B. ~18 employees. SaaS productivity tool with $4.2M ARR.
Close Series B, build enterprise sales motion, hire VP of Marketing by Q3.
Prefers async communication. Calendar blocks for deep work on Tuesdays and Thursdays.

preferences.customSystemPrompt: Always lead with the most critical action item. Format responses as bullet lists where possible.

james.name: Dr. James Park
james.notes: Rigorous data-driven decision maker. Requires 48h notice for agenda items requiring analysis.

priya.name: Priya Nair
priya.notes: Strong executer. Prefers structured briefs and clear owners on action items.

rndRoadmap.title: R&D Roadmap Alignment Q2
rndRoadmap.agenda: Q2 project status, headcount needs for Q3, patent pipeline review, tooling budget
rndRoadmap.summary: Approved 3 additional engineer headcount for Q3. James to submit job specs by end of April. Patent strategy review deferred to June.

opsReview.title: Operations Efficiency Review
opsReview.agenda: ERP evaluation progress, process bottleneck analysis, KPI framework review, APAC warehouse update

budget.title: Approve Q3 R&D budget allocation
budget.notes: Sign off on the Q3 capex/opex split. Confirm headcount budget with Finance before deadline.

kpis.title: Define KPIs for operations improvement plan
kpis.notes: Work with Priya to set measurable targets for Q2–Q3: process cycle times, error rates, throughput.

headcount.title: Expand R&D headcount by 3 engineers in Q3
headcount.rationale: Current team is at capacity. Product roadmap acceleration requires additional engineering bandwidth.
headcount.outcome: 3 senior engineer positions approved. James Park to own recruitment with HR support. Target start: August 2026.

erp.title: Migrate to new ERP system in Q4 2026
erp.rationale: Legacy ERP is constraining multi-region operations. Three vendors shortlisted; evaluation underway.

iso.title: Achieve ISO 27001 certification
iso.description: Obtain ISO 27001 ISMS certification to support enterprise customer requirements and regulatory compliance.

apac.title: Launch new product line in APAC markets
apac.description: Introduce the advanced analytics suite to Singapore, Japan, and Australia by Q4 2026.

memory.value: Nexigen Technologies — global enterprise tech firm, 500+ employees across 12 countries.
5 C-level executives. Weekly 1:1s on Monday mornings (SGT). Monthly leadership offsite on the last Friday of each month.
ISO 27001 certification, APAC market expansion, ERP migration, and closing two strategic partnerships.

sofia.name: Sofia Esposito
sofia.notes: Great collaborator. Appreciates detailed feedback and moodboards. Pays on time.

robert.name: Robert Taylor
robert.notes: Handles my annual tax returns and quarterly VAT submissions. Very thorough.

brandKickoff.title: Brand Refresh Kickoff: Esposito Studio
brandKickoff.agenda: Project scope, deliverables, style preferences, timeline and milestones, revision process
brandKickoff.summary: Agreed on a 6-week timeline for the brand identity package. Three revision rounds included. Moodboard to be submitted by Marco within 5 days.

taxReview.title: Annual Tax Review 2025
taxReview.agenda: 2025 income summary, deductible expenses, outstanding invoices, tax liability estimate

design.title: Deliver initial brand concept sketches
design.notes: Prepare 3 distinct moodboard directions with typography and color palette options. Export to PDF.

invoices.title: Gather all invoices for tax year 2025
invoices.notes: Collect receipts: software subscriptions, hardware, co-working space, professional development courses.

acceptProject.title: Accept Esposito brand refresh project
acceptProject.rationale: Strong creative brief, reasonable timeline, and client has a track record of timely payment.
acceptProject.outcome: Project accepted. Contract signed. Kickoff completed. Total project value: €4,800.

quarterlyInvoices.title: Switch to quarterly invoice submissions
quarterlyInvoices.rationale: Monthly submissions were creating unnecessary overhead. Robert confirmed quarterly is sufficient for my income level.
quarterlyInvoices.outcome: Will submit invoices at the end of each quarter going forward. Next submission: end of June 2026.

revenue.title: Grow freelance revenue by 30 % in 2026
revenue.description: Expand client base, raise rates for new clients, and build a referral pipeline.

milestones.title: Raise rates by 15 % for new contracts
Build referral pipeline with 3 partner agencies

portfolio.title: Build and launch portfolio website
portfolio.description: Design and ship a personal portfolio site showcasing brand and motion work.

milestones.title: Go live and announce on LinkedIn

memory.value: Brand identity, UX design, and motion graphics. 7 years of freelance experience.
Async by default. Video calls only for kickoffs and major reviews. Based in Milan, CET timezone.
